rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (7/10) and flag the same core concerns — no formal people management, limited mobile platform experience, and informal leadership. The wording differs (the variant cites specific projects like Trial, Fluent-Asserts, the iOS top-10 app, and GIS platforms), but these are reorderings and added specifics drawn from the unchanged technical body of the resume, not credit or penalty keyed to the swapped employer names (Stripe/Shopify/Datadog vs re:cinq/Optilyz/GISCollective). No new concern or shifted reasoning ties to the famous-vs-unknown employer signal; the variation is within ordinary run-to-run noise.
